case_title: QIAOCHU "AARON" LI VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,317.00 FILED BY LI, QIAOCHU "AARON" AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
